description_long: This is a classic, two-seater Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in black leather, featuring a gently curved backrest with deep button tufting. The sofa has rounded, padded armrests that are at the same height as the backrest, creating a cohesive and enveloping silhouette. Two large seat cushions provide ample sitting space, while four smaller, square throw pillows in a contrasting gray color are arranged symmetrically at the back and sides. The sofa stands on four short, dark wooden legs, slightly visible beneath the base. The overall design exudes a sense of luxury and comfort, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces. The surface finish is smooth and subtly glossy, highlighting the premium leather material.
description: A black, tufted leather Chesterfield-style sofa with rounded armrests, two seat cushions, and four gray throw pillows, supported by short wooden legs. The design is elegant and plush, ideal for sophisticated urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and four gray pillows arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded armrest, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of the back and side pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, curved backrest with tufting detail and the subtle curvature of the sofa's silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and pillow arrangement from the opposite angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and four smaller, loose square throw pillows arranged symmetrically at the back and sides; backrest is tufted and integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a rolled profile and smooth leather upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs placed at the corners, made of dark wood, slightly exposed beneath the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and curved backrest with deep button tufting, integrated with the armrests for a seamless look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black leather with a tufted pattern on the backrest; seat cushions and armrests are smooth, with no visible decorative stitching.
